findings.evidence: grep: `code/TauCeti/NumberTheory/NumberField/SplitsCompletely.lean:46:theorem algebraMap_int_mem_iff_dvd_of_liesOver`; Mathlib already has `mathlib/Mathlib/RingTheory/Ideal/Over.lean:123:theorem mem_of_liesOver [P.LiesOver p] (x : A) : x ∈ p ↔ algebraMap A B x ∈ P`.
findings.fix: Keep this as a private/local lemma in `MultiquadraticSplitting.lean`, or replace its uses with `Ideal.mem_of_liesOver` followed by `Ideal.mem_span_singleton`; do not add it to the public `SplitsCompletely` API unless a downstream public theorem needs exactly this specialization.
findings.issue: `algebraMap_int_mem_iff_dvd_of_liesOver` exposes a generic helper that is only used to support the private multiquadratic proof decomposition, and it duplicates the existing general API `Ideal.mem_of_liesOver` plus `Ideal.mem_span_singleton`.

summary: The refactor keeps the multiquadratic proof helpers private, but it adds an unnecessary generic public theorem to `SplitsCompletely` for an implementation step.
